profile.name: Franco R.
profile.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
profile.summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 8+ years of experience building high-performance web applications. Passionate about React, TypeScript, and crafting great developer and user experiences. I enjoy working on challenging problems at the intersection of design and engineering.

experience.description: Lead frontend development for a SaaS platform serving 50,000+ users. Own the design system, performance budget, and frontend architecture.
highlights: Reduced initial load time by 40% through code splitting and lazy loading strategies
Built a reusable component library used across 3 product teams
Mentored 4 junior engineers and established frontend coding standards
Led migration from Create React App to Vite, cutting build times by 60%

experience.description: Developed and maintained multiple customer-facing web applications in an agile environment. Collaborated closely with product and design teams.
highlights: Delivered 12+ features from design handoff to production within deadlines
Improved test coverage from 30% to 80% across the main application
Integrated third-party APIs including Stripe, Twilio, and Google Maps
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets and Server-Sent Events

projects.name: CV Bot
projects.description: An AI-powered conversational interface for my personal CV, built with React, TypeScript, and the Vercel AI SDK. Visitors can ask natural language questions about my experience, skills, and projects.
highlights: Multi-provider LLM support (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Groq)
Structured tool calling for precise CV data retrieval

education.details: Focused on algorithms, data structures, software engineering, and distributed systems. Graduated with honors.
